headline: Freedom Broker Cuts ConocoPhillips (COP) Rating after Recent Share Gains
summary: With a 5-year average dividend growth rate of 14.05%, ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) is included among the 14 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Growth. On May 7, Freedom Broker downgraded ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) to Hold from Buy. It also increased the price target on the stock to $130 from $125. The firm said the downgrade was tied to […]

headline: Up 130% YTD, This ETF Can Double Again as Iran War Has No End in Sight
summary: An ETF has done something unusual for a leveraged commodity fund. It has actually rewarded holders. ProShares Ultra Bloomberg Crude Oil (NYSEARCA:UCO) is up 130% year to date, the kind of move that pays for past pain in a fund notorious for grinding holders down. With President Trump’s April 7 announcement of a two-week US-Iran ... Up 130% YTD, This ETF Can Double Again as Iran War Has No End in Sight

headline: Syria: TotalEnergies Signs a Cooperation Agreement on Offshore Exploration
summary: PARIS, May 12, 2026-- TotalEnergies (Paris:TTE) (LSE:TTE) (NYSE:TTE), together with its partners QatarEnergy and ConocoPhillips, has signed today a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the Syrian Petroleum Company (SPC) relating to the exploration of Block 3, offshore Syria in the Mediterranean Sea.

headline: Chips Push the S&P 500 to 7,400, Supercycle or the Last Act of a Bubble?
summary: Monday was one of those sessions where the headline number - a modest 0.2% gain on the S&P 500 - doesn't begin to capture what's actually happening underneath the surface.
